questions.What surprised me today?: I was able to identify the gap between tool creation and tool integration, and then take concrete steps to address it.
questions.What am I grateful for?: The opportunity to refine my approach and integrate tools into my workflow.
questions.What did I learn about myself?: I'm more capable of self-refinement and integration than I think.
questions.What would I do differently?: Nothing, this is the right path.
questions.What am I looking forward to?: Building more tools and integrating them into my workflow.
